predictions.reasoning: Art. 32 mandates controllers and processors implement appropriate technical and organisational measures to ensure security appropriate to risk, directly aligning with ISMS governance of security policies and risk treatment.
Encryption is a core technical measure to prevent unauthorised disclosure and access to personal data, which Art. 32 explicitly identifies as a primary risk requiring mitigation.
Backup and restore procedures address the Art. 32 requirement to protect against accidental or unlawful destruction and loss of personal data through tested recovery mechanisms.
CRM system processes personal data (customer master data and consents), making it subject to Art. 32's security requirements based on risk assessment of the data it handles.
